name: canopy-plugin-typescript
description: TypeScript implementation of the Canopy blockchain plugin

scripts.build:proto: node ./node_modules/protobufjs-cli/bin/pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/proto/index.js proto/*.proto && node ./node_modules/protobufjs-cli/bin/pbts -o src/proto/index.d.ts src/proto/index.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/proto/index.js','src/proto/index.cjs')"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:proto && npm run build:descriptors && npm run build
